title: 2025-01 api version returns 200 instead of 429

posts.author: ParthAtRewind (Parth)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI There,

We are getting 200 status code with 2025-01 instead of 429 in an event where the complexity budget is exhausted. See the picture below.

Screenshot 2025-02-04 at 1.28.41 PM1866×1208 232 KB

The 2024-10 version correctly returns 429 error code with Retry-After header.

Can you please fix this?

Thanks

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ParthAtRewind,

Welcome to the community!

Thanks for reporting this. Our team released a hotfix earlier today to fix this. Here’s the changelog post!

Let us know if you have any other questions.

Best,
Rachel
